description: Create a 24-frame animation featuring a smooth cross-dissolve transition from '/home/ga/OpenToonz/assets/day_bg.png' to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/assets/night_bg.png'. At frame 1, the day image must be fully visible; at frame 12, both images should be at 50% opacity; and at frame 24, the night image must be fully visible. Render the resulting 24-frame sequence as PNG files to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/dissolve/'.
